name: Goldfinch
description: Goldfinch is an onchain private credit protocol ecosystem. Goldfinch Prime is the current private-credit product experience described in the official Goldfinch docs, while GFI is the Ethereum ERC-20 protocol token associated with Goldfinch governance and protocol participation. For Nexus RWA, GFI should be classified as RWA/private-credit protocol infrastructure, not as a direct redeemable claim on a specific credit portfolio, fund share, or reserve-backed asset.

_meta.notes: Identity is scoped to GFI token, while Goldfinch Prime product facts are kept as related context only. Launch date remains null until verified from official token-launch or contract-deployment evidence.
